statement: Scheduler heartbeat re-arming is currently broken or inactive, causing global dispatch stall while runs remain in running state.
rationale: Lock heartbeat is stale, scheduler_scheduled=false across sampled runs, and active transport is empty despite large pending targets.
keyAssumptions: The scheduler is required for dispatch progression in current orchestration mode
No alternate dispatcher is currently active
validationCriteria: Manual scheduler restart yields new queued/running jobs within one or two ticks
critiquePoints: Could be a temporary lull if no actionable targets were present
questions: Why did runScheduler stop re-queuing itself after the last successful tick?
